summary.title: Widget Catalog Test API
summary.description:
This specification is intentionally small and fully documented so it can be
used as a deterministic fixture for testing OpenAPI upload, parsing, detail
display, and AI-assisted Gherkin generation workflows.

The API exposes exactly two operations:
1. `GET /widgets` to list widgets with optional filtering.
2. `POST /widgets` to create a new widget.

All examples, schemas, and responses are included to give the generator
enough grounded context without making the fixture unnecessarily large.
